title: Create: Renewable Netherrack
description: Simple datapack for the Create Mod that makes Dirt & Netherrack renewable through simple mixing recipes
body:
Simple datapack that adds a renewable recipe for both Dirt and Netherrack. Now you can have completely self-sufficient blaze cakes!

**Recipes:**
- Dirt: Mix Gravel with Bone Meal (Minecraft's very best nondescript organic material)
- Netherrack: Mix Dirt with an Iron Nugget over a heated blaze burner.

I may add or update these recipes later to make them feel more balanced.

**Update:** as of right now, version 0.6 of create does not work with this datapack, for one reason or another. I'll be updating it soon :3
